"const fs = require('fs');

const content = fs.readFileSync('seed/healthContent.js', 'utf8');

const replacements = [
  {
    oldQ: '"question": "If students ___ (eat) too much fast food, they will gain weight."',
    newQ: '"question": "If fast food ______ (become) cheaper than healthy meals, more teenagers will choose it regularly."',
    newA: '"correctAnswer": "becomes"',
    newFullA: '"fullCorrectAnswer": "If fast food becomes (become) cheaper than healthy meals, more teenagers will choose it regularly."',
    newAccepted: '"acceptedAnswers": [\n          "becomes"\n        ]',
    newExp: '"explanation": "“Fast food” is singular and uncountable, so we use “becomes.”"',
    newExp2: '"correctAnswerExplanation": "“Fast food” is singular and uncountable, so we use “becomes.”"'
  },
  {
    oldQ: '"question": "People will feel healthier if they ___ (reduce) junk food consumption."',
    newQ: '"question": "Children may develop unhealthy eating habits if junk food advertisements ______ (appear) too frequently online."',
    newA: '"correctAnswer": "appear"',
    newFullA: '"fullCorrectAnswer": "Children may develop unhealthy eating habits if junk food advertisements appear (appear) too frequently online."',
    newAccepted: '"acceptedAnswers": [\n          "appear"\n        ]',
    newExp: '"explanation": "“Advertisements” is plural, so we use the base verb “appear.”"',
    newExp2: '"correctAnswerExplanation": "“Advertisements” is plural, so we use the base verb “appear.”"'
  },
  {

    newQ: '"question": "If healthy meals ______ (not serve) in school cafeterias regularly, students may rely more on fast food."',
